untranslatable_reason: Broadening formation pattern detection requires multi-bar price structure analysis (identifying expanding highs/lows and converging trendlines). This pattern recognition is not expressible using only the allowed point-in-time indicators. The signal also lacks specific exit criteria (marked AUTHOR_SILENT), making exit conditions speculative. Volume trend and throwback/pullback percentages cannot be quantified from the source text.
translation_notes: Translated entry logic as: downtrend confirmation (ADX > 25) combined with price below 20-day MA to approximate 'bear market with downward breakout'. Exit uses reversal above 20-day MA as substitute for unknown exit criteria. Original pattern-specific parameters cannot be operationalized without pattern detection capability.
